name: Nava
oneliner: Nava builds the controls architecture for the AI economy — escrow services, intent verification, and dispute resolution for AI agent transactions, ensuring agent actions match user intent before funds move.
finserv: Explicitly targets any agent handling real capital — prediction markets, treasury management, high-frequency execution, automated auditing. Backed by Polychain and Archetype. Emerged from stealth April 14, 2026.
team: Co-founded by Vyas Krishnan (CEO) and Brianna Montgomery, both previously at EigenLayer. Seed round co-led by Polychain and Archetype.
thesis: Nava directly addresses the dispute resolution and agent payment governance gaps. Its escrow + intent verification model is the exact infrastructure missing from agentic brokerages like eToro Agent Portfolios and Public.com — when an agent proposes a trade, who checks it matches user intent? Nava does. This is external agent infrastructure by definition.
